description: Letter from Abū l-ʿAlāʾ, in Alexandria, to Ḥalfon b. Netanel, in Fustat. Dating: 1141 CE. Abū l-ʿAlāʾ reports on quarrels and intrigues within the Alexandrian community regarding the visit of Yehuda ha-Levi and also includes information about the compilation of Yehuda ha-Levi's new poems in a dīwān. He adds a clandestine postscript in Arabic script, "Burn after reading." (Information from Frenkel.)
tags: Halfon b. Netanel, Yehuda ha-Levi, clandestine
